residential.description: Standard hourly rate for residential repairs and help desk support
residential.notes: First hour minimum, then billed in 15-minute increments

business.description: Standard hourly rate for business IT support
business.notes: First hour minimum, then billed in 15-minute increments

localHomeVisit.description: Free home visit for Turtle Creek residents

extendedHomeVisit.description: Home visit fee for surrounding Mon Valley areas
extendedHomeVisit.coverage: Monroeville, Wilmerding, East Pittsburgh, Braddock, and surrounding Mon Valley communities within 15 miles

businessVisit.description: Free on-site visit for business assessments
businessVisit.notes: Initial consultation and assessment always free

managedCareBasic.name: Managed Care Plan - Basic
managedCareBasic.description: Essential monthly IT support for small businesses
includes: Priority help desk support (response within 4 hours)
Remote support via phone, email, or remote desktop
managedCareBasic.notes: No long-term contract required, cancel anytime with 30 days notice

managedCarePlus.name: Managed Care Plan - Plus
managedCarePlus.description: Comprehensive IT support with enhanced response times
includes: Priority help desk support (response within 2 hours)
Two on-site visits per month (additional visits at discounted rate)
managedCarePlus.notes: No long-term contract required, cancel anytime with 30 days notice

managedCarePremium.name: Managed Care Plan - Premium
managedCarePremium.description: Full-service IT partnership for established businesses
includes: Priority help desk support (response within 1 hour)
managedCarePremium.idealFor: Established businesses with 15+ computers or complex IT needs
managedCarePremium.notes: No long-term contract required, cancel anytime with 30 days notice

diagnostics.notes: We assess the problem at no charge, then provide upfront pricing before any work begins

virusRemoval.description: Virus and malware removal with system optimization
virusRemoval.notes: Price depends on severity of infection and time required

hardwareRepair.notes: Final price depends on specific parts needed. We always get approval before ordering parts.

dataRecovery.notes: Simple backups start at $100, complex recovery up to $300

wifiSetup.notes: Includes router configuration, security setup, and device connection

seniorTraining.description: Patient, step-by-step technology training for seniors
seniorTraining.notes: Smartphone setup, email, internet basics, social media - we go at your pace

starterWebsite.notes: Perfect for small local businesses getting started online

smallOfficeSetup.notes: One-time setup fee for small business office infrastructure

includes: Custom design tailored to your brand
customWebsite.notes: For businesses needing more advanced features or custom functionality

workshops.notes: All workshops are free for community members

principles: Transparent, upfront pricing with no hidden fees
Free consultation and honest assessment before any work
We tell you what you actually need, not what makes us the most money
No surprise charges - you approve the price before we start

paymentTerms.residential: Payment due upon completion. Cash, check, or major credit cards accepted.
paymentTerms.business: Net 15 terms for established business clients. Monthly retainer clients billed automatically.
paymentTerms.warranty: All work comes with a 30-day satisfaction guarantee
